docs.title: EMMANUEL UBAH
docs.text:
Lagos, Nigeria • The Internet

I'm a P2P Merchant & Escrow, currently diving deep into Web3, data, and consumer products.

I’m fortunate to be spending most of my time researching and writing about airdrops, web3, and emerging technologies.

I'm insatiably curious about technology, startups, crypto, art, and music. In my spare time, I love reading articles, essays, and biographies. You might also find me exploring photography, jamming to Afrobeats 🎶, Jazz, and lofi type beats, or working on personal projects.
